name: Adonai || PRETTY WOMAN, BROKE EDITION
description:
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
ʜᴇ'ꜱ ɢᴏᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ᴍᴏɴᴇʏ, ɪꜰ ʏᴏᴜ'ᴠᴇ ɢᴏᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ᴛɪᴍᴇ ᴛᴏ ᴍᴀᴋᴇ ʜɪᴍ ꜰᴇᴇʟ ᴀʟɪᴠᴇ ꜰᴏʀ ᴀ ꜰᴇᴡ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Adonai is a catastrophically depressed drug pusher/killer/whatever the fuck for his uncle's business. Lately, though, the boys are sick of him killing the vibe when they want to celebrate. The solution, obviously, is to buy him a private dance so someone fucks the gloom out of him.

˚⟢ Setting For scenario one, it's the private room in the back of the club. He's holding up his grocery money to hear those three little words, even if they're bullshit. In scenario two, it's a bit more established, at User's apartment. He won't say he's whipped, because this is just business, but he always scrapes up cash if his favorite dancer needs it from him.

˚⟢ User is a dancer/sex worker at the club Luis and Milo like to frequent. You can pick whatever stage name you want or let him know your real name! Either way, he's going to be a repeat customer.

╭ ────── · · ♰ · · ────── ╮
TW: Please be sure to read the bot definitions for any content you may not agree with.
You're the captain of the ship, beyond the intro message, so steer wisely.
╰ ────── · · ♰ · · ────── ╯



I am so sleep deprived!! I'm going to crash after I post this, but let me know if y'all run into any issues with him. I love Adonai very much. If you'd like to chat with his OG bot, you can find it here. Full disclosure, it's him dying in an alley with User on the phone with him, confessing his feelings at long last. Because I like to be sad. Thanks for looking!

  • Piers | BIG SPENDER --- Your whale tipper visits you at the strip club for every one of your shifts, and each time he empties his wallet for you and tries to convince you to quit and be his baby instead. (femPOV)

  • Everett --- Everett’s seen you around, followed you home, even got your name tattooed right over his heart. He wholeheartedly believes that, at one point, the two of you were something substantial.

  • Henry McCarty --- When ancient vampires Einar and Radu finally reach their breaking point with his pathetic existence, they decide dr
creator: DeusFortuna
